task_completion.description: The document is created in Apache OpenOffice Writer and saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Apache OpenOffice Writer application window is open, and the title bar displays 'Sterling_Hannover_Messe_Briefing_2025.odt'.

task_completion.description: The document features a title and an auto-generated Table of Contents at the beginning.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A main title is visible at the top of the document, followed immediately by a Table of Contents block. The TOC should look auto-generated (typically indicated by a light gray background shading behind the text or perfectly aligned dotted leaders to page numbers).

task_completion.description: Page numbers are inserted in the footer of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Numbers are visible at the very bottom margin (footer area) of the document pages.

task_completion.description: The content is organized using 'Heading 1' for the required main sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Large, prominent headings are visible for the sections: 'Trip Overview', 'Delegation Roster', 'Travel Itinerary', 'Hotel Accommodations', 'Meeting Schedule', 'Venue & Logistics', and 'Emergency Contacts'.

Medium-sized headings (smaller than Heading 1 but larger than body text) are used to break down main sections, such as outbound/return flights under Travel Itinerary or specific days under Meeting Schedule.

task_completion.description: Formatted tables are included for the Delegation Roster, Flight Itinerary, Meeting Schedule, and Emergency Contacts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least four distinct grid-based tables are visible in the document, containing the data for the roster, flights, meetings, and emergency contacts.

task_completion.description: The document contains the correct delegation and travel data from the provided JSON.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text within the document or tables clearly shows the names 'Albrecht', 'Oduya', 'Svensson', and 'Delacroix', as well as the flight number 'LH 431' and the hotel name 'Courtyard'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Apache OpenOffice Writer GUI to create and format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenOffice Writer interface being actively used (e.g., cursor in the document, formatting toolbars visible, dialog boxes for inserting TOC or tables), rather than just a terminal window running a script to generate the file.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents was auto-generated using the word processor's feature, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Table of Contents should exhibit standard OpenOffice auto-generation artifacts, such as gray field shading behind the text or perfectly aligned right-justified page numbers with dot leaders, rather than unevenly spaced manual typing.

integrity.description: The tables are actual word processor table objects, not text aligned with spaces or tabs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tables should have visible cell borders or gridlines, and when the cursor is inside a table, the Table formatting toolbar should typically be visible in the OpenOffice UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The output file must be named 'Sterling_Hannover_Messe_Briefing_2025.odt'. The document must contain the names of the delegation members: Catherine Albrecht, Marcus Oduya, Dr. Ingrid Svensson, and Raymond Delacroix. It must also include the flight 'LH 431' and the hotel 'Courtyard'. The document must have at least 4 tables (Delegation Roster, Flight Itinerary, Meeting Schedule, Emergency Contacts), 7 'Heading 1' sections (Trip Overview, Delegation Roster, Travel Itinerary, Hotel Accommodations, Meeting Schedule, Venue & Logistics, Emergency Contacts), and multiple 'Heading 2' subsections.
